chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3619 - قَالَ وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "إِنَّ اَلنَّفْسَ إِذَا أَحْرَزَتْ قُوتَهَا اِسْتَقَرَّتْ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.3619 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) said: "Indeed, when the soul secures its provision, it becomes content."
